About Engineering Exercise

Engineering Exercise is a YouTube channel built on a simple idea: the best way to understand something deeply is to exercise it — to work through it step by step, under real constraints, with honest feedback.

What You'll Find Here

Every video is structured like a training session. A problem is introduced, a method is applied, and the result is analyzed — no hand-waving, no skipping steps. Topics range from system design to algorithm analysis to real-world engineering tradeoffs.

The Channel

[Your story here — who you are, your engineering background, why you started the channel, what drives you to make these videos.]
